case_title: TROY LUCHESSI VS. GLENN WINSTON et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WINSTON, GLENN
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF POSSESSION, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCHESSI, TROY
MINUTES FOR NOV-17-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 504

ORDERED ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 504 FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PARTIES REACHED A WRITTEN STIPULATION. THE TERMS WERE NOT PUT ON THE RECORD. STIPULATION TO BE FILED IF BREACH OF THE TERMS. CO-DEFENDANT MELLONE COOK WAS NEVER IN POSSESSION. PLAINTIFF TO DISMISS CO-DEFENDANT. REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-17-2003 IN DEPT. 504. JUDGE DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: J. BRYCE, #3321 (504)
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCHESSI, TROY COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-17-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCHESSI, TROY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCHESSI, TROY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINSTON, GLENN COOK, MELLONE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4374 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $2,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCHESSI, TROY AS TO DEFENDANT WINSTON, GLENN COOK, MELLONE DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WINSTON, GLENN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK RANI EDWARDS, REPORTER PATTY VAN STEENBERG. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-17-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 504, ROBERT L. DONDERO.
